title: Origin:Reaper
body:
Adds the three stages of the Reaper origin.

## Stage 1:Weak Reaper
### Downsides:
- 3 less hearts
- 75% Damage
- No shield

## Stage 2:Reaper
### Upgrade: Spawn a wither.
### Upside:
- Slight damage increase
- Hunt (Gives weakness glowing and slowness to entities on hit)
### Downsides:
- No shield

## Stage 3:Death's Angel
### Upgrade: Use totem.
### Upside:
- 2x damage
- Hunt (Gives weakness glowing and slowness to entities on hit)
- Phasing ability with flight
- 2 extra hearts
### Downside:
- No shield
